## Meeting Purpose

[Plan a joint dinner event in San Francisco for GrowthX and Understory Agency during Clay Conference week.](https://fathom.video/share/nJZxUpRps4_r_8a17oDQjvC17zsxwG6y?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Event date set for Sept 11th (Monday), targeting 20-25 attendees](https://fathom.video/share/nJZxUpRps4_r_8a17oDQjvC17zsxwG6y?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [Estimated budget: $10-15k, aiming for \~$200/person](https://fathom.video/share/nJZxUpRps4_r_8a17oDQjvC17zsxwG6y?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [Focus on B2B SaaS companies ($10M+ revenue), VPs/Heads of Marketing/Growth](https://fathom.video/share/nJZxUpRps4_r_8a17oDQjvC17zsxwG6y?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [Both parties to compile guest lists, including clients and prospects](https://fathom.video/share/nJZxUpRps4_r_8a17oDQjvC17zsxwG6y?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)

## Topics

### Event Format and Size

  - [Agreed on intimate dinner (20-25 ppl) vs. large event (150+)](https://fathom.video/share/nJZxUpRps4_r_8a17oDQjvC17zsxwG6y?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
  - [Understory attendees: Alex, Ali, possibly Anna (up to 3)](https://fathom.video/share/nJZxUpRps4_r_8a17oDQjvC17zsxwG6y?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [GrowthX attendees: Jason, Marcel, possibly one more (up to 3)](https://fathom.video/share/nJZxUpRps4_r_8a17oDQjvC17zsxwG6y?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [Leaves room for 15-20 guests](https://fathom.video/share/nJZxUpRps4_r_8a17oDQjvC17zsxwG6y?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)

### Target Audience and Invitees

  - [B2B SaaS companies, $10M+ revenue (some flexibility)](https://fathom.video/share/nJZxUpRps4_r_8a17oDQjvC17zsxwG6y?tab=summary&timestamp=528.0)
  - [Titles: VPs/Heads of Marketing, Heads of Growth](https://fathom.video/share/nJZxUpRps4_r_8a17oDQjvC17zsxwG6y?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Include current clients, prospects, and some VCs](https://fathom.video/share/nJZxUpRps4_r_8a17oDQjvC17zsxwG6y?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [Specific companies mentioned:](https://fathom.video/share/nJZxUpRps4_r_8a17oDQjvC17zsxwG6y?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
      - [Abnormal.ai (email security, pre-IPO)](https://fathom.video/share/nJZxUpRps4_r_8a17oDQjvC17zsxwG6y?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
      - [HockeyStack (already signed with GrowthX)](https://fathom.video/share/nJZxUpRps4_r_8a17oDQjvC17zsxwG6y?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Both to share lists of potential invitees for mutual approval](https://fathom.video/share/nJZxUpRps4_r_8a17oDQjvC17zsxwG6y?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)

### Venue and Logistics

  - [Jason to research venues, start Slack channel for coordination](https://fathom.video/share/nJZxUpRps4_r_8a17oDQjvC17zsxwG6y?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [Previous event example: 50 people, $30-35k at larger venue](https://fathom.video/share/nJZxUpRps4_r_8a17oDQjvC17zsxwG6y?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)
  - [Considering more intimate settings (e.g., Ruster with private room for up to 30)](https://fathom.video/share/nJZxUpRps4_r_8a17oDQjvC17zsxwG6y?tab=summary&timestamp=452.0)
  - [Aiming for single-table setup if possible](https://fathom.video/share/nJZxUpRps4_r_8a17oDQjvC17zsxwG6y?tab=summary&timestamp=456.0)

### Budget and Costs

  - [Estimated $10-15k total, targeting \~$200/person](https://fathom.video/share/nJZxUpRps4_r_8a17oDQjvC17zsxwG6y?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [Understory comfortable with up to $5k contribution](https://fathom.video/share/nJZxUpRps4_r_8a17oDQjvC17zsxwG6y?tab=summary&timestamp=178.0)
  - [May include swag/gift bags (to be discussed)](https://fathom.video/share/nJZxUpRps4_r_8a17oDQjvC17zsxwG6y?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)

### Scheduling Constraints

  - [Event date: Monday, September 11th](https://fathom.video/share/nJZxUpRps4_r_8a17oDQjvC17zsxwG6y?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [Alex arrives 11:50 AM on 11th, leaves noon on 13th](https://fathom.video/share/nJZxUpRps4_r_8a17oDQjvC17zsxwG6y?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [Clay Conference on 13th-14th, likely evening event on 13th](https://fathom.video/share/nJZxUpRps4_r_8a17oDQjvC17zsxwG6y?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to research venues and start Slack channel for coordination](https://fathom.video/share/nJZxUpRps4_r_8a17oDQjvC17zsxwG6y?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [Jason to compile and share cost estimates](https://fathom.video/share/nJZxUpRps4_r_8a17oDQjvC17zsxwG6y?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [Both parties to create and share guest lists](https://fathom.video/share/nJZxUpRps4_r_8a17oDQjvC17zsxwG6y?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Discuss potential for swag/gift bags](https://fathom.video/share/nJZxUpRps4_r_8a17oDQjvC17zsxwG6y?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
  - [Finalize venue and send invitations](https://fathom.video/share/nJZxUpRps4_r_8a17oDQjvC17zsxwG6y?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
